instructions: Qasem: visit each contact page, paste the message below, fill the fields as specified.

submissions.contact_page: https://themortgagereports.com — use footer 'Request Rates' link or search for contact form

fields.name: Qasem Mohammed
fields.subject: Free mortgage affordability widget for your readers
fields.category: Partnership / Tool Suggestion (if asked to categorize)

submissions.note: Keep message short — contact forms often truncate. Link to widget page instead of pasting iframe code. Include embed code only if the form has a large text area.
submissions.message:
Hi,

I've been reading The Mortgage Reports — your coverage of mortgage rates, affordability, and homebuying strategies is excellent. I built a free mortgage affordability calculator widget that I think would fit naturally with your content.

It helps readers figure out how much house they can afford using standard DTI ratios. 100% free, no signup, no data collected.

Live preview: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Would this be useful for your readers? Happy to share the embed code.

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

fields.name: Qasem Mohammed
fields.subject: Free tool for homebuyer education programs

submissions.note: Nonprofit contact form — keep warm and mission-aligned. Link to widget page. Include embed code only if there's room.
submissions.message:
Hi,

I've been following NeighborWorks America's work in housing counseling and homebuyer education — the impact you have on families is remarkable. I wanted to share a free tool that might support your counselors.

It's a mortgage affordability calculator widget. Homebuyers adjust income, debts, and down payment to see what they can afford using standard DTI ratios. 100% free, no signup, no data collected.

Demo: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Built as a public resource — no cost, no catch. Would this be useful for your program?

Thank you for the work you do,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
